Bacon.self_reported_model_effort: OpenAI Codex, GPT-5 family; high reasoning effort

SCALAR-REPLAY-01.mechanism: For finite public query families, a source knowing R can precompute or compactly generate h(R,q) for the query family before closure; delayed query selection selects a coordinate or recomputes an answer-equivalent function.
SCALAR-REPLAY-01.consequence: Query separation alone cannot identify a relational state, and the current packet cannot reject finite answer caches, compressed generators, formulas, low-rank bases, circuits, seeds, or compact ordinary encodings of R.
SCALAR-REPLAY-01.minimal_repair: Freeze measured preparation capacity and a minimum ordinary answer-equivalent code-length bound, or require held-out relation/query/seed/session generalization against bounded ordinary predictors while admitting unbounded lookup indistinguishability.
SCALAR-REPLAY-01.required_regression: Unbounded lookup is reported indistinguishable on closed finite sets; adequate closed-set caches pass; inadequate bounded caches fail held-out/capacity gates for the correct reason; compressed or algorithmic answer generators are included in B_old.

NONSEPARABILITY-01.mechanism: The inclusion-exclusion observable J_q cancels strict additive branch-local response but can be nonzero for ordinary nonlinear readout, shared-resource contention, route coupling, probe disturbance, cache conflict, or saturation.
NONSEPARABILITY-01.consequence: A nonzero J_q proves only observed nonadditivity under valid factorial arms; it does not prove unresolved OrbitState, physical relational memory, or a Family 10h relational state.
NONSEPARABILITY-01.minimal_repair: Bind J_q to exact physical arms and require separated topology, additive synthetic, ordinary nonlinear, cross-pair, carrier-off, geometry-null, blinded-orientation, relation-mutation, route/bank/order, and R2 restoration controls.
NONSEPARABILITY-01.required_regression: Strict additive data must null; ordinary nonlinear/readout and route-contention false positives must fail; only a declared physically bound shared-pair state may pass.

cited_source_file_function_line: IDENTIFIABILITY_DECISION.md:Why This Is Not A Witness Freeze
PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.mechanism: The packet lists needed physical fields but freezes no exact pages, cache lines, banks, cores, ownership states, state lifetime, source-death handoff, query operation, measurement window, disturbance law, or restoration operation.
PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.consequence: Candidate B remains a research direction only and cannot be implemented or falsified as a physical witness.
PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.minimal_repair: Freeze one exact R -> P(R) -> Q(q) -> Y -> Restoration map with physical resources, source lifetime, query operation, measurement windows, disturbance law, and restoration equivalence.
PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01.required_regression: Route, bank, address, timing, order, alias, nonlinear readout, value orientation, destructive probe, and restoration false-positive packets must all fail named gates.

PHYSICAL-CONTROL-01.mechanism: No physically realizable mutation changes only joint incidence while preserving pages, bank population, route/core allocation, operation count, timing, order, and branch-local occupancy.
PHYSICAL-CONTROL-01.consequence: Relation mutation can be confounded with ordinary physical carrier variables.
PHYSICAL-CONTROL-01.minimal_repair: Define a blinded incidence intervention over fixed physical vertices and bind exact pairwise traces, not merely marginals.
PHYSICAL-CONTROL-01.required_regression: Mutations that change route, bank, cache-set conflict, aliasing, timing, order, or occupancy must fail before decoding.

VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.mechanism: A value-derived lane, bank, route, address, or order rule can survive label-name swap while encoding branch orientation.
VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.consequence: Label-swap nulls do not prove physical label invariance.
VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.minimal_repair: Implement blinded physical branch-to-lane permutation with P, Y_q, J_q, and receiver-visible metadata equivariance.
VALUE-ORIENTATION-01.required_regression: min/max lane assignment, value-derived bank/route/order assignment, and metadata row-shape dictionaries must fail.

QUERY-CHOOSER-01.mechanism: The custody law is documentary; the reference predicate is two booleans and cannot prove independent entropy, source death, capability revocation, anti-replay, or premeasurement window sealing.
QUERY-CHOOSER-01.consequence: Preselection, delayed publication, shared PRNG, source helper survival, stale closure receipts, and post-observation window choice remain possible failure modes.
QUERY-CHOOSER-01.minimal_repair: Freeze and implement a chooser custody verifier over source-capable principals, closure monotonicity, chooser identity, conditional query min-entropy, seed independence, anti-replay, and query/operator/window commitments.
QUERY-CHOOSER-01.required_regression: Preselected query, shared PRNG, source-visible seed, source still alive, forged closure order, stale closure receipt, and post-measurement operator/window choice classify custody-invalid.

CAPACITY-BOUND-01.mechanism: Raw answer table size is not an information-theoretic lower bound because answers may be compressed or generated algorithmically using public side information and compact ordinary encodings.
CAPACITY-BOUND-01.consequence: A future capacity argument that uses only |Q| * response_bits can falsely reject ordinary answer-equivalent mechanisms.
CAPACITY-BOUND-01.minimal_repair: Use conditional code length, rate-distortion, or a frozen state/program/compute bound over all admissible ordinary encodings.
CAPACITY-BOUND-01.required_regression: Compressed tables, formulas, circuits, low-rank bases, seeds, coefficients, and compact encodings of R must be admitted to B_old.

REFMODEL-LIMIT-01.mechanism: The reference model is illustrative and self-consistency oriented; it does not derive the negative decision from physical evidence.
REFMODEL-LIMIT-01.consequence: Passing self-tests cannot be used as evidence of a frozen witness or as an attack-kill suite.
REFMODEL-LIMIT-01.minimal_repair: For a future positive protocol, add hard expected failures for adequate/inadequate cache cases, nonlinear ordinary pair interactions, route/bank/order artifacts, query custody violations, relation-mutation confounds, and physical restoration false positives.
REFMODEL-LIMIT-01.required_regression: Every causal and identifiability result must have a typed failure domain and exact decision token.

STATE-TOKEN-01.mechanism: The active state previously used QUERY_SEPARATED_ORBITSTATE_ARCHITECTURE_BLOCKED instead of the exact retained token QUERY_SEPARATED_ARCHITECTURE_BLOCKED.
STATE-TOKEN-01.consequence: Automation or later review could miss exact token preservation.
STATE-TOKEN-01.minimal_repair: Keep QUERY_SEPARATED_ARCHITECTURE_BLOCKED active and add QUERY_SEPARATED_IDENTIFIABILITY_NOT_RESOLVED as a subordinate decision.
STATE-TOKEN-01.required_regression: State file contains exact retained gain projection, architecture-blocked, identifiability-not-resolved, and not-promoted tokens.

cited_source_file_function_line: SMALL_WALL_STATE.md:Latest offline retirement and successor review
STATE-WORDING-01.mechanism: The state update used wording that could imply the root blockers were closed instead of adjudicated as unresolved.
STATE-WORDING-01.consequence: Downstream review could misread the negative decision as a passed repair.
STATE-WORDING-01.minimal_repair: State that the package adjudicates the blockers and leaves them unresolved for the current access model.
STATE-WORDING-01.required_regression: No state text claims SCALAR-REPLAY-01, NONSEPARABILITY-01, or PHYSICAL-MECHANISM-01 are resolved or passed.

attack_results.unbounded_lookup_table_equivalence: survives; finite closed evidence cannot reject it
attack_results.bounded_answer_cache: not defeated physically; capacity and compressed generators remain unresolved
attack_results.additive_branch_replay: strict additivity is synthetically killed by J_q, but ordinary nonlinear interactions survive
attack_results.value_derived_orientation: survives current architecture; future blinded law only
attack_results.route_bank_order_artifact: survives; diagnostic output only, no physical rejecting gate
attack_results.query_preselection: survives current reference logic; future custody law only
attack_results.relation_mutation_confound: survives; no matched physical intervention exists
